title: pleuranthodium neragaimae
intro: Pleuranthodium neragaimae is a plant species belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, commonly known as the ginger family, native to the Philippines. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory properties, which help to alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The medicinal properties of Pleuranthodium neragaimae also make it a potential treatment for various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its health benefits and is also used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being.
